title: peltogyne catingae subsp. catingae
intro: Peltogyne catingae subsp. catingae is a plant species belonging to the family Fabaceae, commonly known as the pea family. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, pain, and inflammation, due to its anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties. The health benefits associated with Peltogyne catingae subsp. catingae include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and soothing inflammation, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of the plant involve infusions, decoctions, and infusions of its leaves and stems, which can be used to create teas, tinctures, and other medicinal products.
